published.text:
### Hero
Heading: AI Automation for Dental Practices
Body: Your front desk is the bottleneck. They are answering phones, confirming appointments, chasing recall patients, and processing intake forms — all while trying to give the person standing in front of them a good experience. AI automation handles the repetitive communication so your team can focus on patients in the chair.
Sub: Below: what dental automation looks like in practice, where it delivers the clearest ROI, and how to decide if it is the right move for your practice.

### Core sections
- These are the automations we build most often for dental offices. Each one reduces front desk load without changing your clinical workflow:
- New patient inquiry response
- Online booking and confirmations
- Recall and reactivation campaigns
- No-show follow-up

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers for dental practices considering automation

### Final CTA
Heading: Ready to free up your front desk?
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current patient communication workflow, identify where time and appointments are being lost, and give you a clear plan for automation.

edits.description: Published as part of the bounded first programmatic SEO batch for dmytroai.com.
Structured for both SEO and GEO: direct answer opening, sectioned decision content, FAQ, and proof-adjacent linking.
Avoids fake case studies or invented industry results.
Written for commercial intent, not generic educational traffic.
